creator: taoka@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I asked intlfonts's mainteiner Mr. Kenichi Handa <handa@etl.go.jp> 
about this problem. Then he told me that he would replace the new 
taipei16.bdf (which is applied your patch-aa) on 
ftp.ifcss.org:/software/fonts in intlfonts-1.3. 

So I apply your patch-aa to intlfonts-1.2 until intlfonts-1.3. 

Thank you.
